reasoning: Reviewed the full Order Notes / Comments History. Pattern explicitly indicates possible account compromise or fraud and instructs escalation. Order status is Complete and item is marked Shipped. Given the fraud risk and internal escalation directive, this refund should not be approved or denied at frontline level and must be escalated for further investigation (delivery confirmation, carrier tracking, account security review).
